human_readable_name: Parcel base geometry and situs record
jurisdiction: San Diego County, California, United States
geography: Countywide parcel coverage used by the San Diego parcel page path
known_limitations: Repository does not contain the import pipeline or dataset receipt for this source.
public.parcel_page_api_v2 is remotely observable but not reproducible from committed migrations.

source_agency_or_publisher: San Diego County Assessor / Recorder / County Clerk
jurisdiction: San Diego County, California, United States
geography: Countywide assessor attributes joined into parcel records
known_limitations: Current repository only observes downstream columns in public.parcel_page_api_v2.
The repository does not verify assessor vintage, acquisition timing, or import completion.

human_readable_name: Mapped parcel zoning and zoning family fields
source_agency_or_publisher: TruLot parcel view over public zoning sources
jurisdiction: City of San Diego, California, United States
geography: Mapped zoning fields exposed on parcel records used by the public parcel page
known_limitations: Repository does not contain the source zoning import or parcel-to-zone derivation logic.
Base-zone derivation is remotely observable through public.parcel_page_api_v2 but not rebuilt locally.

source_agency_or_publisher: City of San Diego Development Services
jurisdiction: City of San Diego, California, United States
geography: Permit activity rows used for parcel timelines, search momentum, and nearby precedent summaries
known_limitations: Permit linkage logic is partly reproducible, but the permit import pipeline and receipt trail are missing from the repository.
The public parcel page currently depends on both public.parcel_permit_terminal_v2 and public.trulot_permit_parcel_link_v1.

human_readable_name: Overlay polygons for TPA, SDA, and CTCAC checks
source_agency_or_publisher: TruLot overlay lookup over mapped public layers
jurisdiction: City of San Diego, California, United States
known_limitations: Repository contains the overlay lookup function but not the source-layer acquisition/import process.
Point-boundary semantics are determined by ST_Contains and therefore exclude points on polygon boundaries.
